creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 249925
add LICENSE missing in x11-toolkits ports

This completes the second round and covers all missing LICENSE
declarations x11-toolkits category ports.

Ports covered are:
girara
gnome-pty-helper
gtkglextmm
gtkmm24
gtksourceview2
itk
kproperty
linux-c7-gtk2
linux-c7-gtk3
linux-c7-openmotif
linux-c7-pango
linux-c7-qt-x11
linux-c7-tk85
mowitz
p5-Gtk2-Chmod
p5-Gtk2-ImageView
p5-Gtk2-PathButtonBar
p5-Tk-Autoscroll
p5-Tk-ColourChooser
p5-Tk-Contrib
p5-Tk-DKW
p5-Tk-Date
p5-Tk-DynaTabFrame
p5-Tk-Enscript
p5-Tk-FontDialog
p5-Tk-GBARR
p5-Tk-JComboBox
p5-Tk-Splashscreen
p5-Tk-WaitBox
py-Pmw
qml-box2d
qt5pas
qt6pas
qwt5-qt5
qwt6
shared-desktop-ontologies
tix
tkdnd
tkshape
tktray
unique
vte

Now on to the x11-themes...
